THEFACELESS-CORRUPTION.title: Corruption
THEFACELESS-PARANOIA.description: If the enemy is not attacking it loses strength equal to its Paranoia at the start of turn.\nALL Paranoia is removed regardless.
THEFACELESS-PARANOIA.smartDescription: If the enemy does not intend to attack it loses strength equal to its Paranoia at the end of turn ALL Paranoia is removed regardless.
THEFACELESS-PARANOIA.title: Paranoia
THEFACELESS-BREAKING_POINT_POWER.title: Breaking Point
THEFACELESS-COUGH_UP_BLOOD_POWER.smartDe: Whenever you apply or gain [gold]Corruption[/gold] deal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage to all enemies.
THEFACELESS-COUGH_UP_BLOOD_POWER.title: Cough Up Blood
THEFACELESS-ONE_WITH_NONSENSE_POWER.smar: At the start of your turn gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Corruption[/gold].
THEFACELESS-WANDER_OFF_POWER.smartDescri: At the start of your turn apply [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Corruption[/gold] to a random enemy.
THEFACELESS-WANDER_OFF_POWER.title: Wander Off
THEFACELESS-ITERATION_CYCLE_POWER.title: Iteration Cycle
THEFACELESS-DONT_LOOK_POWER.smartDescrip: Whenever you play a card this turn apply [blue]{Amount}[/blue] Corruption to the enemy.
THEFACELESS-DONT_LOOK_POWER.title: Don't Look
THEFACELESS-INSPIRE_CABAL_POWER.smartDes: At the start of your turn apply [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Corruption[/gold] to EVERYONE and [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Ritual[/gold] to ALL enemies.
THEFACELESS-INSPIRE_CABAL_POWER.title: Inspire Cabal
THEFACELESS-DEGRADING_SANITY_POWER.smart: At the start of your turn apply [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Paranoia[/gold] to ALL enemies.
THEFACELESS-DEGRADING_SANITY_POWER.title: Degrading Sanity
THEFACELESS-NO_EYES_POWER.smartDescripti: Whenever you apply [gold]Paranoia[/gold] to an enemy draw a card.
THEFACELESS-NO_EYES_POWER.title: No Eyes
THEFACELESS-HYPOCHONDRIA_POWER.smartDesc: Whenever you apply [gold]Paranoia[/gold] to an attacking enemy apply [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Weak[/gold]
THEFACELESS-HYPOCHONDRIA_POWER.title: Hypochondria
THEFACELESS-ARRHYTHMIA_POWER.title: Arrhythmia
THEFACELESS-DEMENT_POWER.smartDescriptio: Whenever you play a card with [purple]Déjà vu[/purple] gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold]
THEFACELESS-DEMENT_POWER.title: Dement
THEFACELESS-HUNTER_FORM_POWER.smartDescr: At the start of you turn add a [gold]Tentacle Strike[/gold] to your hand.
THEFACELESS-HUNTER_FORM_POWER.title: Hunter Form
THEFACELESS-TO_THE_ARK_POWER.smartDescri: At the start of your turn add a random card enchanted with [purple]Déjà vu[/purple] to your hand.
THEFACELESS-TO_THE_ARK_POWER.title: To The Ark
THEFACELESS-HUNTER_FORM_UPGRADED_POWER.s: At the start of you turn add a [gold]Tentacle Strike[/gold]+ to your hand.
THEFACELESS-BAD_HABITS_POWER.smartDescri: Whenever you apply [gold]Corruption[/gold] to an enemy gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] Corruption
THEFACELESS-BAD_HABITS_POWER.title: Bad Habits
THEFACELESS-SHATTER_IDENTITY_POWER.smart: Whenever you apply a debuff to an enemy gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
THEFACELESS-SHATTER_IDENTITY_POWER.title: Shatter Identity
THEFACELESS-PSYCHOGENESIS_POWER.smartDes: Whenever you apply [gold]Paranoia[/gold] to an enemy gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
THEFACELESS-PSYCHOGENESIS_POWER.title: Psychogenesis
THEFACELESS-OPERATOR_FORM_POWER.smartDes: At the start of you turn play a random card with [purple]Déjà vu[/purple] from your [gold]Exhaust[/gold] pile.
THEFACELESS-OPERATOR_FORM_POWER.title: Operator Form
THEFACELESS-PSYCHE_POOL_POWER.smartDescr: At the start of your turn gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to the cards in your [gold]Exhaust[/gold] pile.
THEFACELESS-PSYCHE_POOL_POWER.title: Psyche Pool
THEFACELESS-DROWN_IN_STATIC_POWER.smartD: At the start of your turn apply [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Corruption[/gold] to EVERYONE.
THEFACELESS-DROWN_IN_STATIC_POWER.title: Drown in Static
THEFACELESS-BEGIN_INFECTION_POWER.smartD: Whenever you play a power gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Corruption[/gold]
THEFACELESS-BEGIN_INFECTION_POWER.title: Begin Infection
THEFACELESS-CONSEQUENCES_POWER.smartDesc: Whenever an enemy attacks you it takes [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage for each unique debuff it has.
THEFACELESS-CONSEQUENCES_POWER.title: Consequences
